title: ONGC OPaL Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 80 Apprentices Posts
description: The ONGC Petro Additions Limited (ONGC OPaL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 80 Graduate Apprentices and Trade Apprentices. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Any Degree, B.E./B. Tech, ITI can apply for the ONGC OPaL Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, s...
